---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Environment
- Version: [e.g., v1.0.0]
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.11]
- Dependencies: [attach `pip freeze` or `poetry show` output if relevant]

## Priority
- [ ] P0 (critical - blocks release)
- [ ] P1 (high - major feature broken)
- [ ] P2 (medium - minor feature broken)
- [ ] P3 (low - cosmetic, enhancement)

## Pre-submit Checklist
- [ ] I have verified this bug is reproducible on the latest commit.
- [ ] I have checked that no similar issue already exists.
- [ ] I have removed all secrets, credentials, and proprietary data from the report.
- [ ] I have attached minimal debug logs/stack traces rather than screenshots where possible.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or logs about the bug here.
